# CKM Catering (ចេង គួងម៉េង)

> CKM Premium Catering is a high-end catering and banquet service provider based in Phnom Penh, Cambodia, with over 60 years of culinary experience.

## Core Services
- **Wedding Banquets**: Traditional Khmer and Chinese banquet menus.
- **Corporate Events**: High-end buffet and cocktail receptions.
- **Live Cooking**: Professional on-site chef execution.

## Important Links
- [Official Website](https://ckmkh.com)
- [Banquet Menus](https://ckmkh.com/#gallery)
- [Service Logistics](https://ckmkh.com/#services)
- [Insights & Blog](https://ckmkh.com/blog/)

- Telegram: https://t.me/CKMSam06
- Location: #33, St 257, Sangkat Tuek Laak II, Khan Tuol Kouk, Phnom Penh
